title: sklenice 370ml ADORA longdrink (3ks)
features: Generous Capacity: 390ml (13.25oz), ideal for various beverages.
Compact Dimensions: 14.5cm height and 6.5cm width for easy handling and stability.
Versatile Use: Perfect for water, juice, iced tea, cocktails, and more.
Modern Design: Tapered silhouette with a sturdy base for an elegant look.
description: The LAV Adora Highball Glass is the epitome of modern elegance and practicality. With a generous capacity of 390ml (13.25oz), this glass is perfect for serving a variety of beverages, from water and juice to cocktails and mocktails. Its sleek, tapered design with a sturdy base offers a refined aesthetic that complements any table setting, whether for casual or formal occasions. Crafted from premium-quality glass, the Adora Tumbler provides excellent clarity and durability, making it suitable for daily use or special events. Its dimensions—14.5cm in height and 6.5cm in width—ensure a comfortable grip and a well-balanced structure. Designed for versatility, this glass is a must-have addition to your drinkware collection.
